intent: Wide-shell 2BR / 2 baths CLUSTERED, genuine FRONT-BACK split, GR style — 14x10 lot, NO CARPORT. Envelope 10x6 = 60 m² floor. One wall spans the full width, dividing the front public band (great_room + kitchen, side-by-side) from the rear private row (master | ensuite | common | standard, baths clustered in the middle). Solves via ldk_horizontal=true (relaxes the solver's default LDK vertical-stacking rules) and master-only left anchoring (great_room is NOT left-anchored, letting it span freely to reach every private-row room it must share a wall with). Dirty kitchen enabled: sits in the side setback adjacent to kitchen (kitchen has no rear wall in this topology, so it can't be placed behind kitchen like every other topology), with a service door from kitchen out to it.
must_haves: one wall spans the full width dividing public front from private rear
great_room and kitchen sit side-by-side across the front, not stacked
master and standard each door directly into the great room, no hall
ensuite and common bath clustered together in the middle of the private row
dirty kitchen in the side setback adjacent to kitchen, with a door from kitchen
